tweets.text: .@RealTomHoman: "I've spent over 40 years doing this. These men and women that carry that badge and gun are American patriots. They put themselves on the line for this nation everyday.... they're mothers and fathers, too. They're sons and daughters too—and if they've seen a fraction of the tragedies I've seen in my career, they take a lot of damage home everyday."
